payload_summary: Final payout package for the Ignite phase of the Moon-to-Mars networking platform. Includes 10,000 Milestone deliverables: AKS migration logic, 10,000 heartbeat validation (523 RPS), Phase 3 structural expansion design (10,000 m²), and autonomous recycling ROI validation ($10,000/month). Consolidated achievements documented in MASTER_10000_EXECUTION_REPORT.md.
